nodes.label: AI image generation capability
nodes.label_negative: Manual creation of images (slow, lower quality)
nodes.grounding_span: it is so much easier and faster to have AI generate higher quality images than I could ever make

nodes.label: AI ability to produce age-appropriate content
nodes.label_negative: Lack of age-appropriate materials without AI
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a bridge to creating the needed content quickly

nodes.label: AI photo-realism quality
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes there are odd anatomical inconsistencies, or some other element that is wrong

nodes.label: Workplace acceptance of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: they have explicitly forbidden the use of AI generated images when putting decks up for sale

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human skills
nodes.grounding_span: coming up with ways to let AI enhance whatever we are attempting to do can only benefit

nodes.label: Student engagement and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to engage students and have them practice looking at the images

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it is so much easier and faster to have AI generate higher quality images

nodes.label: Creative control and originality
nodes.grounding_span: easily customizable so that we can target specific learning goals quickly

nodes.label: Frustration with AI image generation
nodes.grounding_span: I was very satisfied at the end of last school year

nodes.label: Frustration with AI prohibition on Boom Learning
nodes.grounding_span: One thing that is super frustrating to me is that when creating Boom Learning cards, they have explicitly forbidden the use of AI generated images

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think that coming up with ways to let AI enhance whatever we are attempting to do can only benefit

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: If something needs to be altered, I send a follow up prompt to tweak the image until it suits my needs

nodes.label: Template-based structured delegation
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to delegate the image generation, then create the digital materials... myself
